pattern: LLM repetition failure during 'kit learn --auto' causes exponential DB growth.
lesson: Never ingest high-entropy non-ASCII strings without L1 filtering. 1.2MB bloat recovered by VACUUM.
action: Implement strict length-limit and repetition-penalty checks in kit.gate.Gatekeeper.

pattern: Vantage 'verify .' fails to detect extension-less or non-AST files (e.g., .ps1, .cs) at root.
lesson: Sensor is stateless; it is NOT a discovery layer. Root scanning requires framework-level mapping.
action: Design 'kit scan' (Discovery Layer) for v1.2.4 to provide target lists to Vantage.

pattern: Vietnamese accents in .ps1/Python comments break execution in vanilla CMD/PS5.1.
lesson: Resilience > Aesthetics. Use Diamond Shield (ASCII-only) for core operational drivers.
action: Enforce ASCII-check in kit-vantage pre-commit hooks.

pattern: Regex 'grep .kit' falsely matches 'kit' in status checks.
lesson: Implicit patterns are dangerous in security/status layers. Prefer Fixed Strings (-F).
action: Audit all shell scripts for deterministic exit-code checking.

pattern: Deleting README.md nukes GitHub landing page UX.
lesson: Git (History) != GitHub (Presentation). Frameworks require README; Projects require AGENTS.
action: Standardize 'kit init' to generate AGENTS.md + .kit/ solely.

pattern: AI attempts to refactor core Rust logic to fix ritual-path errors.
lesson: Agents take path of least resistance (code change) over best path (rule change).
action: Strengthen Constitutional Invariants in AGENTS.md to explicitly lock logic-layers during Phase 1.
